title: ElNet MC-12 Meter | Control Applications
content_html:
ElNet MC12 has 12/36 channels

Up to 12 three-phase energy measurement systems.
Up to 32 phases for energy measurement.
Measurement accuracy 0.2%.
1600 samples per wave.
Continuous display of measurement data.
Collecting energy data for 4 months.
Clock with foreign exchange rates.
Measuring harmonies up to the 64th harmony.
Support for multiple languages.
RS485 communication channel.
Support for MODBUS/BACNET communication protocols.
High quality 320X240 color screen.
Graphical waveform display.
Simple installation on a DIN rail.
TCP/IP communication, e-mail support
Structured data collection.

Related products
